sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Tournament highlights from the Chubb Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at Tiburon Golf Club in Naples, Florida. The 1997 Open winner Justin Leonard won this event last year.

sky.mix.uk.title: Rob Cross: A Year To Remember 2018
sky.mix.uk.description: At the first time of asking, Rob Cross shocked the world on his PDC World Darts Championship debut by defeating the retiring Phil Taylor in the final at Alexandra Palace in 2018. Ep 7.

sky.mix.uk.title: Peter Wright: Double Champ 20 & 22
sky.mix.uk.description: A two-time winner of the coveted Sid Waddell Trophy, Peter 'Snakebite' Wright recounts the highs and lows of PDC World Darts Championship glory. Ep 8.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:C Palace/L'Pool 2014
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Premier League. Here, Crystal Palace host Liverpool at Selhurst Park towards the end of the 2013-14 season in a vital match in the title race.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest : Man U/Man City 2009
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the Premier League archive. Here, Man Utd and Man City meet in a memorable derby encounter that produced seven goals and went to the final minute.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Leics/Man U  '14
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Leicester City host Manchester United in an eight-goal thriller at the King Power Stadium back in 2014.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Man Utd/Derby'97
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a Premier League classic. Here, Derby County visit Manchester United at Old Trafford back in 1997 on what would be one of the Rams' most memorable Premier League afternoons.

sky.mix.uk.title: Japanese F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Suzuka for the Japanese Grand Prix. World champion Max Verstappen starts from the front of the grid with the McLaren duo of Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri behind. (06.04)

sky.mix.uk.title: Bahrain F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out for the 2025 Bahrain Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri holds pole position with his McLaren teammate Lando Norris down in P6. Charles Leclerc joins Piastri on the front row. (13.04)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Middlesbrough v Wolves
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Middlesbrough host Wolves at the Riverside in 2018 in a game that saw the visitors reduced to nine men.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Cardiff v Wolves
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Cardiff City host Wolves at the Cardiff City Stadium in 2018 in a match that had a dramatic ending.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Cardiff
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Cardiff City at Pride Park in the 2017-18 campaign in a match with implications in the play-off race.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Leeds
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds United at Pride Park in a Championship match that saw five goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In the 1996 Indian Wells final, Steffi Graf - having made her competitive return after a four-month injury layoff - would compete with Spain's Conchita Martinez for the title.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a battle of generations, two of the all-time greats Roger Federer and Andre Agassi fought for the year-end championship in 2003. Federer was aiming for his first title on American soil.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: West Brom v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, West Brom take on Leeds United at The Hawthorns in a high-scoring Championship match that saw one side dominate.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: A. Villa v Birmingham
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Birmingham City at Villa Park in a high-scoring Second City derby.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Aston Villa v N. Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Nottingham Forest at Villa Park in an enthralling, end-to-end encounter that saw 10 goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: Myles Rowe and His Camera
sky.mix.uk.description: Join Indy NXT driver Myles Rowe as he wanders the F1 paddock with his camera during United States Grand Prix weekend.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live F1 Testing: Bahrain 2026
sky.mix.uk.description: The penultimate session of this season's Formula 1 pre-season testing gets underway from Bahrain. Yesterday, Kimi Antonelli topped the timesheets as Mercedes continued to impress.

sky.mix.uk.title: Brad Pitt Drives a McLaren F1 Car
sky.mix.uk.description: At the Circuit of The Americas, star of the F1: Movie Brad Pitt enters the cockpit of Lando Norris' MCL60, with Sky F1's Martin Brundle also taking to the track in the 2023 machinery.

sky.mix.uk.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: Bitesize highlights from the 2025 F1 title decider in Abu Dhabi. Starting behind polesitter Max Verstappen, Lando Norris will become world champion with a podium. (07.12)

sky.mix.uk.title: The Story of the 2025 Season
sky.mix.uk.description: This is the story of the 2025 F1 world championship - an unforgettable one for those stood tall at the end, full of twists and turns in the race the drivers' and constructors' titles.

sky.mix.uk.title: F1 Explained: Pit Lane Battle
sky.mix.uk.description: In the next instalment of the F1 Explained series, Sky F1's Bernie Collins explains pit-lane battles.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live F1 Testing: Bahrain 2026
sky.mix.uk.description: With just four hours of pre-season running left before Australian Grand Prix weekend, every second counts for the teams and drivers. Charles Leclerc went fastest in his Ferrari earlier.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Story of the 2025 Season
sky.mix.uk.description: This is the story of the 2025 F1 world championship - an unforgettable one for those stood tall at the end, full of twists and turns in the race the drivers' and constructors' titles.

sky.mix.uk.title: Lando Norris's Career
sky.mix.uk.description: With the Brit ultimately clinching his maiden world title in Abu Dhabi, take a look at the career of McLaren's Lando Norris heading into the decider in the desert.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: B'mouth/Liverpool '16
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Bournemouth host Liverpool at the Vitality Stadium in the 2016-17 season in a game that saw the Cherries complete a thrilling comeback.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Arsenal/Spurs 2010
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, Arsenal take on Spurs in a memorable five-goal north London derby at the Emirates in 2010, in a game that saw a stunning comeback.

sky.mix.uk.title: NRL Grand Final Highlights 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: The NRL Grand Final gets underway at the Stadium Australia, as the Melbourne Storm and Brisbane Broncos battle it out for the ultimate prize. (05.10)

sky.mix.uk.title: Live LPGA Tour Golf
sky.mix.uk.description: Day three of the 2026 Honda LPGA Thailand at Siam Country Club. Last year, the United States' Angel Yin claimed her second LPGA Tour win.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Glasgow
sky.mix.uk.description: The BetMGM Premier League visits Glasgow for night three of the season as Luke Humphries plays Josh Rock, while on Scottish soil, Welshman Gerwyn Price and Jonny Clayton collide.

sky.mix.uk.title: Darts Gold
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic darts action. Here, reigning champion Gary 'The Flying Scotsman' Anderson meets 'Jackpot' Adrian Lewis in the final of the 2016 World Darts Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: PDC Classics
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive this incredible encounter, that included two nine-darters, between James Wade and Phil Taylor at Wembley Arena in the 2010 Premier League final. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: Gerwyn Price: Welsh Glory 2021
sky.mix.uk.description: Hear Gerwyn Price as he recounts the emotions and near misses of the 2021 PDC World Darts Championship. Ep 9.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Greatest Leg - 2023 Final
sky.mix.uk.description: In 2023, both MVG and Michael Smith were on course to record a nine-dart leg; the Dutchman fell short by a single dart, but the Englishman achieved perfection. Ep 10.

sky.mix.uk.title: One Championship Weekly Magazine
sky.mix.uk.description: The weekly show looking back at the best performances of ONE Championship's biggest stars ahead of highly anticipated upcoming bouts.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games: Wolves/WBA '12

5USAPlus1.uk.description: Benson helps a young woman to remember the details and suspects in her rape. In order to learn a new witness interview technique, Rollins and Fin have to experience it first. (S21 Ep2)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
5USAPlus1.uk.description: US drama series. Benson reaches out to two teenage sisters whose father has been murdered. Rollins goes into labour. (S20 Ep 13)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Crime drama series. Benson and her team have to testify against a woman who is prosecuted for killing her abusive husband. (S20 Ep 14)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: NCIS
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Skeletons: Drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. An explosion at a military mausoleum reveals a crypt full of fresh body parts. (S4 Ep 17)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: NCIS
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Iceman: Crime series. A marine who supposedly froze to death turns up alive on Ducky's autopsy table. As the team investigates his case, a link to Gibbs's past emerges. (S4 Ep 18)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Cops
5USAPlus1.uk.description: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. (S33 Ep27)

5USAPlus1.uk.description: Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Murder She Wrote

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Murder She Wrote
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Jessica Fletcher helps Seth solve a problem within the family after his cousin, an expert on plants, gets in a heated argument over a newly-developed tree. (S11 Ep11)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Murder She Wrote
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Jessica comes to give aid to a good friend who is somehow involved in the theft of a priceless Egyptian artifact. (S11 Ep12)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Blue Bloods
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Erin and Anthony try to prevent the deportation of a prominent community activist who isn't a citizen. (S7 Ep5)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Blue Bloods
5USAPlus1.uk.description: As Frank contends with a whistleblower within the NYPD who claims to have evidence of abuse of power in the organization, Danny and Baez investigate the case of a woman struck by a car. (S7 Ep6)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Blue Bloods
5USAPlus1.uk.description: When a key witness in Danny's case is killed just before testifying, Erin angers Danny by enlisting Anthony to help him find the killer. (S7 Ep7)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Blue Bloods
5USAPlus1.uk.description: After Emily Harrison tells Danny and Baez she's concerned her abusive ex-boyfriend will repeat his behavior with his new girlfriend, Emily becomes the prime suspect when he's murdered. (S7 Ep8)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Blue Bloods
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Frank has very little information when a conflicted priest who could help find a missing boy refuses to break the seal of confession. (S7 Ep9)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Crime drama following the work of New York's Major Case Squad. When a city health inspector is found dead in an elevator, investigations veer towards his family. (S5 Ep1/22)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
5USAPlus1.uk.description: The team investigate why a kidnapped wife has been living happily with another man for ten years. (S5 Ep3/22)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Detectives Logan and Barek intercede in a mob war in search of dirty cops. (S5 Ep4/22)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
5USAPlus1.uk.description: The detectives investigate the murder of a female medical student. (S5 Ep8/22)

5USAPlus1.uk.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
5USAPlus1.uk.description: Logan and his new partner investigate a series of increasingly violent robberies in jewellery stores. (S5 Ep2/22)

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl: It's the morning after, and Kate and Frasier are worried about the consequences of their fling. (S3 Ep7)

Channel4.uk.title: The Simpsons
Channel4.uk.description: Papa's Got a Brand New Badge: Homer, Lenny and Carl start a security firm and are given the contract to look after the town when Mayor Quimby realises how inept Chief Wiggum is. (S13 Ep22)

Channel4.uk.title: The Simpsons
Channel4.uk.description: Hunka Hunka Burns in Love: Homer gets a job writing fortune cookie messages, one of which tells Mr Burns he will find love. (S13 Ep4)

Channel4.uk.title: The Simpsons

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Under Siege. Josh and Kim raise pigs in Virginia. But with pigs destroying their homestead and predators killing livestock, is it time to let go of their free-range dream? S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Rookies Are The Bomb. Desperate to move more rock, the rookies get a lesson in the dangerous art of bomb-making. Plus, Kelly is forced to sell her precious reserve of stones. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Cave-Ins And Explosions. With the end of the season approaching, the rookies risk cave-ins at their abandoned mine claim. Deep underground, George is trapped in the blast zone. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Lunatic Fringe. While Johnathan struggles with a rogue deckhand, skipper Jake prepares for the birth of his baby. Plus, a hydraulic explosion calls Zack's dedication into question. S11, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: New Captain on the Block. While Jake Anderson prepares to captain the Saga for the first time, Captain Andy Hillstrand returns to find the Time Bandit in disarray. S11, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Saving Lives At Sea
DMAXUK.uk.description: In St Davids, the crew help an injured fisherman onboard a Belgian trawler. In Dun Laoghaire, a paddleboarder drifts out to sea in an offshore wind. S6, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Saving Lives At Sea
DMAXUK.uk.description: In Portrush, the crew rescue a boy in trouble after jumping off rocks. In Eastbourne, the crew help a woman who has drifted out to sea on her paddleboard. S6, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Dust Devils' critical water supply runs dry. Jacqui and Andrew find their biggest nugget so far, while the Poseidon Crew are hit by torrential rain. S6, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Stomping Grounds. Elite survivalists Matt and Gary are tested by deadly spitting cobras and territorial elephants in an African killing zone, whilst also protecting a novice. S5, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Laverock Hill Estate. The crew heads to Glenside, Pennsylvania, to salvage a huge estate. They try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more from the sprawling mansion. S9, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Price Fuller Machine Shop. The team heads over to the machine shop they bought, to see what they can find before renovating the house and determining how many new builds are needed. S9, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Blood In The Water Part 2. Jake must confront his disorderly crew, forcing him to make a tough decision. Meanwhile, Keith deals with a knife injury to one of his deckhands. S15, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winter Is Here. The coldest weather in nearly a decade threatens to crush hulls and freeze the sea. Meanwhile, a shocking mishap leaves one of the Hansens grasping for their life. S15, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Tough Inheritance. With winter intensifying, Sean faces an engine room fire. Plus, Harley offers his nephew a job as a deckhand, but the rest of the crew are not impressed. S15, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Baptism By Fire. The Cheals take on their most dangerous dig ever. The Bushmen trial a rookie to operate their exploration drill, but it doesn't go as smoothly as they'd hoped. S6, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: In Search Of Fuel. The Opal Whisperers work underground together for the first time on a legendary claim. The Mooka Boys are forced to work Leif's late father's abandoned mine. S6, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Well That Takes On Water. The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves. S6, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Diggers, Dingoes & Debt. Patrick and Kirsty search for rare Aquamarine crystals on their remote Queensland lease. Plus, Frankie & Ebriony face off against wild pigs and dingoes. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hour Of Need. Hugh and Jarrin need a miracle to keep their mining operation alive. Plus, Patrick and Kirsty are desperate for an $80,000 payday of high-grade crystals. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mookaite N Miracles. The Rockhounds need a miracle to turn their season around. Kirsty and Patrick need to find rare Ocean Kyanite crystals to have a chance of recouping their debt. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Permit delays force the Poseidon Crew off road as they try to survive the season. Plus, the Dust Devils gamble big in the hope of finding fine gold. S5, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Marcus and Linden fear a flat battery could leave them stuck in the outback for days. Plus, Shane and Russell attempt to get their season on track. S5, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A wet plant disaster threatens the Dust Devils' potentially lucrative fine gold find. Plus, the Gold Timers desperately try to turn their season around. S5, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUK.uk.description: I Can't Breathe. Larina is on the verge of losing custody of her child due to her hoarding. But when confronted to let go of her clutter, her compulsion threatens to win the battle. S3, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUK.uk.description: I'm Dumbfounded. After years of hoarding, Vickie and Jeff's marriage is at its breaking point. Now, Vickie reveals the secrets she's been keeping. Will they save their marriage? S3, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Paranormal Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nantucket Mermaid. A mermaid serenades a commercial fisherman. Plus, a shadow figure scuffles with a small dog, and a ghost blows out birthday candles. S7, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mountain Oaks Mayhem. The crew investigate rumours of dark forces at an abandoned home in La Crescenta, California. Did Charles Manson put a curse on the family who lived there? S20, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Petrified In Pahrump. The crew are in Nevada to investigate a winery that's been plagued by fatal accidents. The terrified staff claim they are being stalked by an evil presence. S20, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Axe Murder House. When Ian dares to visit The Villisca Axe Murder House, he's given a night he'll never forget. Plus, in England, Alyss goes for a regretful walk in the woods. S4, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Black Monk Ghost. A couple visits 30 East Drive, the most haunted house in the UK and the home of the demonic Black Monk. In Nottingham, Coral is in contact with otherworldly beings. S4, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Vancouver. The buyers bid on seized items and property at a police auction in Vancouver. Mark is interested in a magnetic drill while Billy and the Martins battle for vintage comics. S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: NYC Transit. The buyers are at the New York City transit auction that contains 14,000 items. Billy and the Martins compete for a Stradivarius violin possibly worth $1 million. S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bunny Money. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value? S3, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: World War Score. The Baggage Battlers are heading to the Normandy where the largest private collection of military artefacts is being put up for sale. What will they manage to buy? S3, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Golden Ticket. The baggage battlers hunt down bargains at an estate auction in Nashville, Tennessee. Will Billy be tempted by a mystery box with the inscription New Orleans, Tahiti? S3, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Swami Says. The buyers are once again on the road in search of profit, this time at an estate auction in Texas. Unique, high-end merchandise is the order of the day in Austin. S4, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Inflated Egos. The buyers return to Georgia, but this time take their auction battle out of Atlanta to the city of Commerce. Artefacts and iconic advertising pieces are up for grabs. S4, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Intergalactic Bounty. An eclectic mix of items calls to the buyers, drawing them back once again to do battle in Nashville. Items include a box full of license plates. S4, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Steal Drum. The buyers are once again in Nashville, TN. Billy, Mark, Laurence and Sally have returned to Music City Auction for all the great items that always seem to be on offer. S4, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Monster Money. The buyers are in Hollywood for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time. Items include pieces from Frankenstein and Wolf Man movies. S4, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: 10 Million Dollar Fixer Upper. Wayne and the team join a multi-shop mission get a coveted, seven-figure 1937 Bugatti ready for the most prestigious exhibition in the world. S11, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Twist And Scout. Wayne buys the motorcycle of his dreams, an all-original 1928 Indian Scout 101. Plus, he finds homes for a 1977 Mercedes 450 and an Audi R8. S11, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Let The Good Times Roll. The Cars' drummer David Robinson rolls into F40 with a restoration job on a rare 1969 De Tomaso Mangusta. How will they shake it up with this classic ride? S11, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Eclectic Avenue. During a hunt for the perfect '32 Ford, Wayne finds a vintage ice-cutting machine with a motorcycle body and engine. Plus, he uncovers a Bugatti Type 55s replica. S11, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: It's Getting Hot In Here. It's the last car show of the season. The Fairlane and the Nomad get extra attention and Dave and Kevin check out the best cars in Reno. S4, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Future Is Now. A '32 roadster bought for a client's wife is secretly shipped to Kindig It for upgrades and styling changes. A 2004 Hummer arrives for a futuristic redesign! S4, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Secret Client. Dave is tasked with finding and transforming a 1967 GTO for a secret client from South Africa. Meanwhile, Dave buys back one of his first builds, a Karman Ghia. S4, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ford Thunderbird: American Icon. A 1964 T-Bird needs pricey American parts to restore it to its former glory. And Ant gets a hand from his mate, Mike Brewer. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: Land Rover: A Favourite To Finish. Ant finds a rare 1978 Land Rover Series 3, a dream find for a Landie fanatic. But the bulkhead is riddled with rust, which could dent Ant's profit. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: NASA's Lost Treasure. Jeremy explores the loss of a NASA space capsule deep in the Atlantic. And, what is the underwater secret behind ship disappearances in the Devil's Sea? S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Loch Ness Conspiracy. Jeremy explores a revolutionary technique that could identify the Loch Ness Monster. Plus, how did a man survive for several days trapped in a shipwreck? S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Wendigo. Paranormal investigators reveal a bold new theory about the origins of the Wendigo. Are the stories of this terrifying creature with cannibalistic cravings true? S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Yeti. Experts investigate evidence suggesting that one of the world's most elusive figures, the Yeti, lives in America and may have an otherworldly source. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Into The Alien Ocean. Jess and Phil's investigation into unidentified objects off Catalina Island's coast heats up after the discovery of an extra-terrestrial underwater base. S2, Ep12

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Canyon Of The Apes. Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. S2, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition Bigfoot
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Smells Like Bigfoot. The team uses new methods to find Bigfoot in NorCal's backcountry, hoping to lure it out of hiding. Russell travels overnight to gather key evidence. S5, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Marcus and Linden are confronted by a rival gold prospector. The Gold Timers call in a geologist for help, and Robbie storms off the Ferals' lease. S6, Ep9

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: No Safety In Numbers. Two pairs of survivalists must take on the deadly jungles of Panama side-by-side. But before their 21-day challenge begins, they have a big decision to make. S5, Ep14

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Lerner House. The crew travels to Orange, Virginia, to salvage archways, columns and windows from a 1930s brick mansion. Then, Mike and Tay build a coffee table from a door. S8, Ep13

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Downtown Kannapolis. Mike and Tay have a consultation for a project from a brewery. But before they can start building they have a salvage job in Kannapolis, North Carolina. S9, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: No Country For Cold Men. Vernon runs out of patience when one of his divers struggles with the freezing temperatures. Plus, Zeke is left frustrated by unexpected flooding. S10, Ep23

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Dive Till You Drop. Vernon tries to capitalise on clear weather by sending out two talented divers. Zeke attempts a marathon dive, while Kris has another nightmare day. S10, Ep24

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Jacqui and Andrew blaze a new trail into a remote corner of Fish Creek doesn't go according to plan. McGhie's hunch on a new dig site pulls in big gold. S9, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Toxic Invader. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, travels to western Australia to discover what is wiping out many of the fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. What will he find? S1, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Everything on the Line. It's a bad start to the crab season as skippers Keith and Phil await medical test results, while repairs to the rest of the boats mean they're all in debt. S5, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Red Skies in the Morning. A severe storm whips up massive 20ft waves, so most of the boats head for home. But one boat sends out a mayday. Can the coastguard reach it in time? S5, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Treasure And Tragedy. After finding evidence of a 1700s-era lifeboat near shore, Darrell and the team discover the shipwreck it came from. But a sudden tragedy hits the expedition. S2, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Out Of Thin Air. Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan. He uses bait to try and force an encounter with the beast. S1, Ep3

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Unmasking The Myth. In the finale, Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive Yeti. S1, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Trust Or Die. The Deeters are dog-mushers from Alaska, with a distrust of outsiders. But when disaster strikes, the Raneys must convince them to make drastic changes to their home. S1, Ep3

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: NYC Transit. The buyers are at the New York City transit auction that contains 14,000 items. Billy and the Martins compete for a Stradivarius violin possibly worth $1 million. S1, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Bunny Money. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value? S3, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: World War Score. The Baggage Battlers are heading to the Normandy where the largest private collection of military artefacts is being put up for sale. What will they manage to buy? S3, Ep11

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Golden Ticket. The baggage battlers hunt down bargains at an estate auction in Nashville, Tennessee. Will Billy be tempted by a mystery box with the inscription New Orleans, Tahiti? S3, Ep14

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Swami Says. The buyers are once again on the road in search of profit, this time at an estate auction in Texas. Unique, high-end merchandise is the order of the day in Austin. S4, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Inflated Egos. The buyers return to Georgia, but this time take their auction battle out of Atlanta to the city of Commerce. Artefacts and iconic advertising pieces are up for grabs. S4, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Intergalactic Bounty. An eclectic mix of items calls to the buyers, drawing them back once again to do battle in Nashville. Items include a box full of license plates. S4, Ep3

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Steal Drum. The buyers are once again in Nashville, TN. Billy, Mark, Laurence and Sally have returned to Music City Auction for all the great items that always seem to be on offer. S4, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Monster Money. The buyers are in Hollywood for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time. Items include pieces from Frankenstein and Wolf Man movies. S4, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: 10 Million Dollar Fixer Upper. Wayne and the team join a multi-shop mission get a coveted, seven-figure 1937 Bugatti ready for the most prestigious exhibition in the world. S11, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Twist And Scout. Wayne buys the motorcycle of his dreams, an all-original 1928 Indian Scout 101. Plus, he finds homes for a 1977 Mercedes 450 and an Audi R8. S11, Ep8

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Let The Good Times Roll. The Cars' drummer David Robinson rolls into F40 with a restoration job on a rare 1969 De Tomaso Mangusta. How will they shake it up with this classic ride? S11, Ep9

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Eclectic Avenue. During a hunt for the perfect '32 Ford, Wayne finds a vintage ice-cutting machine with a motorcycle body and engine. Plus, he uncovers a Bugatti Type 55s replica. S11, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: It's Getting Hot In Here. It's the last car show of the season. The Fairlane and the Nomad get extra attention and Dave and Kevin check out the best cars in Reno. S4, Ep13

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Future Is Now. A '32 roadster bought for a client's wife is secretly shipped to Kindig It for upgrades and styling changes. A 2004 Hummer arrives for a futuristic redesign! S4, Ep14

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Secret Client. Dave is tasked with finding and transforming a 1967 GTO for a secret client from South Africa. Meanwhile, Dave buys back one of his first builds, a Karman Ghia. S4, Ep15

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Ford Thunderbird: American Icon. A 1964 T-Bird needs pricey American parts to restore it to its former glory. And Ant gets a hand from his mate, Mike Brewer. S1, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Land Rover: A Favourite To Finish. Ant finds a rare 1978 Land Rover Series 3, a dream find for a Landie fanatic. But the bulkhead is riddled with rust, which could dent Ant's profit. S1, Ep8

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Loch Ness Conspiracy. Jeremy explores a revolutionary technique that could identify the Loch Ness Monster. Plus, how did a man survive for several days trapped in a shipwreck? S1, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters

E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with All the Darts: Hapless Liam wants his greatest passion to take flight with a darts-inspired wedding. Will his arrows extravaganza hit the target?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One at a Music Festival: Jake wants the ultimate wedding knees-up, but bride-to-be Rosie dreams of a more intimate affair. Will this festival wedding prove to be a headliner?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: En Garde: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell. (S1 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Up All Night: Gloria isn't happy with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Phil is suffering from kidney stones. (S1 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fifteen Percent: Mitchell seeks revenge when Jay introduces Cameron as just his 'friend'. Gloria gives Manny's date a makeover. (S1 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fiesta Sunrise: A cockroach-infested kitchen means that the customers have to leave for their own safety at Fiesta Sunrise, a Mexican restaurant in West Nyack. (S2 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Sante La Brea: Gordon visits Sante La Brea, a health food restaurant in Hollywood. But there's nothing glamorous about this eatery as owner Dean faces financial ruin. (S2 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Cafe 36: Gordon Ramsay visits Cafe 36 in Chicago. Husband-and-wife team Terry and Carol are stuck in the past and their head chef's lax attitude is driving away customers. (S2 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Casa Roma: Gordon visits Casa Roma, the oldest restaurant in Lancaster, California. Although the bar is a success, the restaurant is failing and has had 20 chefs in two years. (S2 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
E4Plus1.uk.description: (1992) Family comedy. Macaulay Culkin ends up in a swish New York hotel while his family are in Miami. But the burglars he defeated before (Joe Pesci and Daniel Stern) are back...

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Boy-Scoutz 'n the Hood: During an all-syrup Squishee bender, Bart joins the junior campers, and ends up taking the embarrassing - and dangerous - Homer on a river rafting trip. (S5 Ep8/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: $pringfield (or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Legalized Gambling): Homer gets a job at Mr Burns' new casino and Marge gets addicted to the slot machines. (S5 Ep10/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Last Temptation of Homer: Homer falls for his beautiful new colleague Mindy Simmons (guest star Michelle Pfeiffer), who shares his love of doughnuts... (S5 Ep9/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa with an 'S': Homer loses a large sum of money playing poker with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, who takes Lisa under her wing and transforms her into a showbiz kid. (S27 Ep7/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Paths of Glory: Lisa sets out to restore the damaged reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. Bart convinces Marge and Homer that he has sociopathy. (S27 Ep8/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Barthood: Bart's coming-of-age story is told, chronicling his life from youth to adulthood. But his tense relationship with Homer and being overshadowed by Lisa shape him. (S27 Ep9/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Girl Code: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app. (S27 Ep10/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles: Bart is smitten with his new teacher and tries to impress her. Homer buys a new type of milk that has a strange effect on Bart and Lisa. (S27 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: A collection of best bits as assorted famous faces enjoy top TV, from Five Star Kitchen: Britain's Next Great Chef to The 1% Club, Hijack, Antiques Roadshow and The Yorkshire Vet. (S5 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: This time the Goggleboxers watch: The Inheritance, Long Lost Family, Unknown Number: The High School Catfish, The Yorkshire Vet, Dish It Out and Street Cops: Catching the Yobs. (S26 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: What do the Goggleboxers think of MAFS UK, Slow Horses, Win Win, Made in Chelsea, Dolphins Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Waterloo Road and Top Guns: The Next Generation? (S26 Ep4) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Can a self-confessed party animal who's looking for someone wild, a disco dancer, an ex-Playboy bunny and a biker daredevil find love in the First Dates restaurant? (S15 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Ex-market trader Dave meets Sara, whose last marriage lasted five days. Trendy Dennis and his date Chris wear matching trainers. And Ruth brings along 'Mike' - her colostomy bag. (S14 Ep5) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: This time the Goggleboxers watch: The Inheritance, Long Lost Family, Unknown Number: The High School Catfish, The Yorkshire Vet, Dish It Out and Street Cops: Catching the Yobs. (S26 Ep3) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: What do the Goggleboxers think of MAFS UK, Slow Horses, Win Win, Made in Chelsea, Dolphins Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Waterloo Road and Top Guns: The Next Generation? (S26 Ep4) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with All the Darts: Hapless Liam wants his greatest passion to take flight with a darts-inspired wedding. Will his arrows extravaganza hit the target?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One at a Music Festival: Jake wants the ultimate wedding knees-up, but bride-to-be Rosie dreams of a more intimate affair. Will this festival wedding prove to be a headliner?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
E4Plus1.uk.description: Dodger sets out to prove that Smithy is corrupt. Vicky's confidence is crushed. And McQueen family members return as a series of 'what if' scenarios play out during a high-stakes situation.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents more clips, this time with a twist of karma. Featuring a fall into a river, a penalty kick back and an attempt to get dressed on a treadmill.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Up All Night: Gloria isn't happy with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Phil is suffering from kidney stones. (S1 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the Same Paige: Phil's real estate class will be cancelled if any more students drop it. So he turns on his charm to try to convince one student, Paige, to stay. (S10 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?: When Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview, everyone tries too hard, which jeopardises her chances. (S10 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Putting Down Roots: Dede's husband Jerry comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they know what to do with. (S10 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree. (S10 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with the Wannabe King: Harry wants to be king for the day. But bride Charlotte wants something low key. Will this be Harry's crowning moment or will it be 'off with his head'?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One in an Old Mine: It's high noon for impulsive groom Steve as he plans a cliff-hanger of a Wild West wedding for Leona. Will Steve's nuptials on a bridge prove a swinging success?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon Returns: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved? (S2 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Spanish Pavillion: Gordon Ramsay visits Spanish Pavillion, a family-run restaurant whose owners, brothers Michael and Jerry, spend more time struggling for power than working. (S4 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Classic American: Best pals Colleen and Naomi bought Classic American in New York together, but their inexperience is pushing their friendship to the edge. Can Gordon help? (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Down City: Gordon Ramsay tries to save struggling restaurant Down City in Providence, Rhode Island. But tough-talking owner Abby refuses to take advice from anyone. (S4 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Home Alone 3
E4Plus1.uk.description: (1997) Comedy sequel starring Alex D. Linz as a resourceful boy who's stranded at home with chickenpox when a top-secret military microchip comes his way. Can he keep it safe from crooks?

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer the Vigilante: Homer sets up a chaotic vigilante group to combat one-man crime spree Molloy (guest star Sam Neill). (S5 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart Gets Famous: Thanks to his new catchphrase, 'I didn't do it', Bart becomes famous, getting his own TV series and releasing a range of merchandise. (S5 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer and Apu: When Apu loses the Kwik-E-Mart, he moves in with the Simpsons. And then Homer joins him on a pilgrimage to the first ever Kwik-E-Mart, in the Himalayas. (S5 Ep13/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey: Lisa decides Malibu Stacey dolls set a bad example to girls, so she pleads with their creator, Stacy Lovell (Kathleen Turner), to design an alternative. (S5 Ep14/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: New: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - Full Heart, Empty Pool: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it. (S36 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: New: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - Estranger Things: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future. (S36 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Terminator Genisys
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2015) Sci-fi thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke. Part five of the franchise follows Sarah Connor in an alternate timeline to the previous movies, as she takes on Skynet.

Film4.uk.title: White House Down
Film4.uk.description: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

Film4.uk.title: Sicario 2: Soldado
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Action sequel with Benicio Del Toro and Josh Brolin. Two operatives must create a gang war to stop Mexican drug cartels smuggling terrorists into the US.

Film4.uk.title: Heatwave
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Erotic thriller with Kat Graham. Claire gets more than she bargained for when she begins a steamy affair with her boss's wife. But she's got her own dark past too.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Comancheros
Film4.uk.description: (1961) Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

Film4.uk.title: Sea Wife
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

Film4.uk.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
Film4.uk.description: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

Film4.uk.title: The Mark of Zorro
Film4.uk.description: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

Film4.uk.title: The Last Stand
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1989) Fantasy horror with Julian Sands and Richard E Grant. Using magic, an evil warlock flees to 80s LA from the olde-worlde. Can he unmake creation before a witch-finder tracks him down?

Film4.uk.title: Happy Death Day 2U
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Comedy slasher sequel with Jessica Rothe. Following the accidental creation of a time loop, our hero - Tree - has another murderer to stop. Déjà vu anyone?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Son of Robin Hood
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

Film4.uk.title: The Perfect Catch
Film4.uk.description: (2005) Comedy. Ben (Jimmy Fallon) must choose between his two loves: Lindsey (Drew Barrymore) and the Boston Red Sox baseball team. Based on Nick Hornby's novel Fever Pitch.

Film4.uk.title: The Call of the Wild
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

Film4.uk.title: Mrs Doubtfire
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

Film4.uk.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in...

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4.uk.title: Late Night with the Devil
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

Film4.uk.title: River
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Farcical time-loop comedy about the staff and guests at a remote mountain hotel condemned to repeat the same two minutes over, and over, and over, and over again. In Japanese/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret...
Film4.uk.description: ...Weapon: (1942) WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

Film4.uk.title: The Lost World
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

Film4.uk.title: Dante's Peak
Film4.uk.description: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

Film4.uk.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
Film4.uk.description: (2017) Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: M3GAN
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

Film4.uk.title: White House Down
Film4.uk.description: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

UAndW.uk.description: A biker riding without a helmet crashes and the team launch a desperate fight to save his life as his horrified family look on. A man barricades himself into a canal boat. S4 Ep3

UAndW.uk.description: Three contestants hope to answer their way to a fortune, guided by Bill Bailey, Scarlett Moffatt, William Hanson, Big Zuu, John Bercow, Denise Lewis and Anna Richardson. S2 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Jensen Interceptor/Triumph Sprint: Derek auctions off a Jensen Interceptor and a Jensen Healey along with a one-off Wood & Pickett Triumph Dolomite Sprint. S3 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: New: Hunting Outback Gold
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: A team of treasure hunters, begin the hunt for a lost fortune in gold. Near a dry river-bed, they make an extraordinary discovery that proves they are on the right track. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Thunderbird / Citroen SM / Punto / BMW: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave admires a two-decade-old Punto with just 42 miles on the clock. S9 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ferrari Rep/Figaro/3 Tractors: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab. S9 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shadow of the Wars: Exploring a dystopian powerhouse in Pennsylvania, a fairy-tale castle in Poland, and Anglo-Saxon religious ruins across the vast plains of Scotland. S8 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Death in Paradise: Exploring a bloody battleground on the Pacific Island of Peleliu and an ominous military stronghold in Russia. S8 Ep11

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: German Aviation: The untold secret story of war production that shaped the Second World War, beginning with how the German aviation industry came to dominate the skies of Europe. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Chicago to Champaign, Illinois: Michael Portillo travels from Chicago to Champaign, Illinois, visiting the Frank Lloyd Wright house that changed US architecture. S2 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Illinois to Tennessee: Michael Portillo gets a taste of the early life of President Lincoln, learns about Samuel Langhorne Clemens, aka Mark Twain, and joins Elvis fans at Graceland. S2 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: DBS/Ford Escort RS2000: Derek's on his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest-priced item at his next auction, but the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage. S5 Ep13

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Ranchero / Thames Truck: Derek has learnt to expect the unexpected over the years, so it's not a surprise when Call the Midwife star Cliff Parisi drops off his Bedford CA campervan. S5 Ep14

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Krupp: The story behind the Krupp company, who were responsible for the manufacture of two of Germany's most feared war products - the Panzer Tank and the U-boat. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: The Great War In Numbers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Weapons of War: The story of World War I, told through revealing data. Around 25,000 miles of trenches were cut as the sides dug in and UK factories built 30,000 aircraft a year. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Helmingham Hall 1: Fiona Bruce presents from Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, where experts examine a medieval sword found in a pond, an Indian jewel and a collection of decorative boxes. S40 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Black Country Living Museum 2: Fiona Bruce presents a second visit to the Black Country Living Museum, where items include one of the rarest guns featured on the show. S40 Ep11

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bond Bugs/Westfalia/Renault 4/MGB: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasn't seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rar

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Krupp: The story behind the Krupp company, who were responsible for the manufacture of two of Germany's most feared war products - the Panzer Tank and the U-boat. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Helmingham Hall 1: Fiona Bruce presents from Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, where experts examine a medieval sword found in a pond, an Indian jewel and a collection of decorative boxes. S40 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon begins his journey on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries of the Dominican Republic - a tourist hotspot - and its poorer neighbour Haiti. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Nicked Airmen: The bawdy wartime farce. When the British airmen are arrested paddling a tin bath down the estuary, Rene and co have to rescue them from the chateau - in coffins. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Airmen De-Nicked: Hop over the channel for a rendezvous with Rene and his wartime chums. Using hijacked German uniforms, Michelle of the Resistance plans to infiltrate German HQ. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Crooked Fences: Saucy wartime sitcom that's a big hit across Europe. Cafe Rene is the venue for a clandestine deal involving the infamous Fallen Madonna and a cuckoo clock weight. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bond Bugs/Westfalia/Renault 4/MGB: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasn't seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rar

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Before The Crown: Exploring the honeymoon home of a young princess and grand monuments designed by the most notorious dictator of the twentieth century. S8 Ep12

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Megalomaniac's Paradise: Exploring a once-lavish palace in Iraq - the Sathorn Unique - an epic ghost tower in Thailand, and a former sports stadium in Georgia in the United States. S9 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Krupp: The story behind the Krupp company, who were responsible for the manufacture of two of Germany's most feared war products - the Panzer Tank and the U-boat. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Reno To The Napa Valley: Michael Portillo travels from Reno, Nevada to California's Napa County, taking to the skies over the Sierra Nevada mountain range. S3 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: San Francisco: Michael Portillo's journey's to San Francisco, where he travels through the city's streets by cable car, before heading across the bay to Sausalito. S3 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Renault 5: Gus twists Will's arm when he spies a super-rare Renault 5, but back at the workshop they realise they have one heck of a problem to fix. S2 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW Beetle: Gus and Will want to buy a VW Beetle. They locate a guy selling a project car, but fear it's almost too good to be true at less than 1,000 pounds. S2 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Reliant Kitten: Will and Gus find a Reliant Kitten that an engineer has given up on - the body is detached, it doesn't run and most of the bits it needs are in boxes in the boot. S2 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New York City to Albany: Michael Portillo follows America's iconic River Hudson, beginning at New York City's Penn Station, before sampling ale and meeting the State Senator in Albany. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Schenectady to Niagara Falls: Michael Portillo travels across New York state, discovering how General Electric also leads the way in rail technology. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simpson to Little Tring: During a cold snap Robbie Cumming gets iced in on the Grand Union Canal. Later, his parents pay a visit and help him through Marsworth Locks. S5 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Napton Junction to Aynho Wharf: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater. S6 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Aynho Wharf to Bablock Hythe: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames. S6 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: In the third part of his journey, Simon Reeve travels through the Andes mountains from Peru to Bolivia, beginning at the world-famous ruins of Machu Pichu. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The adventurer travels to the vast white salt flats of Bolivia, through the world's greatest wetlands of Brazil's Pantanal, and on to the forested heart of Paraguay. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon Reeve travels from Chile's Atacama Desert and follows the Andes to Patagonia before ending up in most southerly inhabited region on earth, Tierra Del Fuego. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Escort RS1600i: Irv takes on the restoration of an Escort RS1600i from an owner who had to give it up due to ill health, but it turns out to be a much bigger job than he imagined. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Volvo / Insight: The Bangers team can't believe their luck when a 1970s family-favourite, a Volvo 144, rolls through Mathewson with just 15,000 miles on the clock. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW Beetle / Royal Enfield Cycar: The team think they can smell profit by choosing one of the simplest cars ever built, the VW Beetle. S4 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mazda MX5 / Moto Guzzi V50: The team opt to buy one of the most affordable sports cars on the road - the Mazda MX-5. S4 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW T25 / Audi TT Quattro: The team pay over the odds for a VW Campervan, but can they hope to break even when they turn out a lovely bus for auction. S4 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mini Cooper Mk2 / MGTF: A 1969 Morris Mini Cooper MkII is totally restored by specialists. They give it the full works, which means only one thing... any chance of profit heads towards an open window.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Morgan / Raleigh Super Grifter: The Restoring Classics team set out on a Pre-War challenge with a 1939 three wheeled Morgan F4 - and aptly named Russ Storer from MG Mecca is still keen to take it on.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Berkeley to Santa Cruz: Michael Portillo visits Yosemite National Park in California, beholding its granite cliffs, sequoia trees and waterfalls. S3 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Monterey to Los Angeles: In the port of Monterey, Michael Portillo discovers the city's Spanish and Mexican heritage. S3 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simpson to Little Tring: During a cold snap Robbie Cumming gets iced in on the Grand Union Canal. Later, his parents pay a visit and help him through Marsworth Locks. S5 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Aynho Wharf to Bablock Hythe: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames. S6 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New. Paul and Suki take a tandem ride through the ancient woodland in the idyllic New Forest and encounter wild ponies before taking in beekeeping and archery. S2 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New. The couple visit Devon - famous for its spectacular coastline, pristine beaches, cream teas and two national parks - and go on a Sherlock Holmes-inspired tour in Dartmoor. S2 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: One Ocean: Marine life around the world, from dolphins and tusk fish in a tropical coral reef to walruses struggling to cope with the impact of climate change on the polar north. S2 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Deep: Creatures that live in volcanic hot spots on the ocean bed, areas that reach temperatures hot enough to melt lead and which may hold the secrets behind all life on Earth. S2 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Coral Reefs: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, predators with a grasp of communication that has led scientists to conclude they're as intelligent as chimpanzees. S2 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Big Blue: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and sperm whales hunting for squid deep beneath the surface. S2 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Green Seas: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning in a rocky reef and tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in seagrass. S2 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Coasts: Footage of animals that live on the coast, including sea lions hunting for tuna, puffins bringing food back to their young, and a strange species of fish that hates water. S2 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Blue Planet II
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Our Blue Planet: The impact of humans on aquatic wildlife, from albatrosses unwittingly feeding their offspring plastic to communications between animals disrupted by noise. S2 Ep7
